title: Method Level 2A — Foundations
summary: First steps in D position, G position, and A minor — single-hand exploration of three new five-finger positions.

exercises.title: D Position Intro
exercises.summary: Right hand steps through the D five-finger position, meeting F-sharp for the first time.
exercises.goal: Read and play all five notes of D position including F-sharp.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: D Position Halves
exercises.summary: Slow half-note melody highlighting the D-position notes including F-sharp.
exercises.goal: Sustain each half note while reading the D-position key signature.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: D Position Skips
exercises.summary: Thirds and skips within D position, including F-sharp leaps.
exercises.goal: Jump between D-position notes confidently with accurate F-sharp placement.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: D Position Waltz
exercises.summary: Five-measure waltz in D position — first 3/4 reading with F-sharp.
exercises.goal: Feel the waltz pulse while reading D-position notes in 3/4 time.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: D Bass Steps
exercises.summary: Left hand steps through the bass D position with F-sharp.
exercises.goal: Read all five D-position notes in bass clef including F-sharp.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: D Bass Halves
exercises.summary: Slow half-note bass line in D position.
exercises.goal: Sustain bass D-position half notes with a full, resonant tone.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: D Bass Melody
exercises.summary: Left-hand D-position melody mixing quarters and halves.
exercises.goal: Play a flowing D-position bass melody with accurate F-sharp.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: G Position Intro
exercises.summary: Right hand discovers the G five-finger position from G4 to D5.
exercises.goal: Read and play all five notes of G position in treble clef.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: G Position Halves
exercises.summary: Slow half-note melody exploring G-position notes.
exercises.goal: Sustain long tones while reading the G four-line position.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: G Position Waltz
exercises.summary: Five-measure waltz in G position.
exercises.goal: Feel the three-beat waltz pulse while reading G-position notes.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: G Position Skips
exercises.summary: Thirds and skips within G position.
exercises.goal: Navigate G-position skips cleanly, including the leap to D5.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: G Bass Intro
exercises.summary: Left hand discovers the bass G position from G2 to D3.
exercises.goal: Read all five notes of bass G position in bass clef.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: G Bass Halves
exercises.summary: Slow half-note line in bass G position.
exercises.goal: Sustain half notes with a warm tone in bass G position.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: G Bass Skips
exercises.summary: Left-hand G-position skips including a third from G2 to B2.
exercises.goal: Play thirds and skips accurately in bass G position.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: A Minor Steps — Right Hand
exercises.summary: Right hand walks through the A natural minor five-finger position.
exercises.goal: Read and play the natural minor five-note pattern starting on A3.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: A Minor Halves — Right Hand
exercises.summary: Slow half-note melody in A minor five-finger position.
exercises.goal: Sustain the minor-mode half notes with a singing, darker tone.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: A Minor Steps — Left Hand
exercises.summary: Left hand walks through the bass A minor five-finger position.
exercises.goal: Read and play the natural minor pattern from A2 to E3 in bass clef.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: A Minor Halves — Left Hand
exercises.summary: Slow half-note bass melody in A minor position.
exercises.goal: Sustain minor-mode half notes with a deep, resonant bass tone.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: A Minor Waltz
exercises.summary: Six-measure waltz in A minor — the first minor-mode waltz.
exercises.goal: Play a minor-mode waltz with a clear three-beat feel and darker character.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: Level 2A Capstone
exercises.summary: Six-measure D-position melody drawing on all three new positions introduced in Level 2A.
exercises.goal: Play fluently in D position as a capstone of Level 2A foundations.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.
